releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### 🌟 Most Notable

**Minimum Obsidian version**: Updated to 1.8.7.

**Breaking change**: JavaScript execution in Tasks queries is now disabled by default and must be explicitly enabled in the Tasks settings. This affects `filter by function`, `sort by function`, `group by function`, and JavaScript expressions in placeholders; existing queries using these features will show an explanatory error until you enable the setting. See the [details](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/JavaScript+in+Tasks+Queries) and the [security rationale](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks-contributing/Architecture+Decisions/ADR-002+-+Security+Response+to+JavaScript+Execution+in+Queries).

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

#### 💪 Fixes

- fix!!: For security, JS search features now disabled by default, with setting to enable by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3860

#### 📖 Documentation

- contrib: Update snippets and examples in markdown by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3857

#### 🛠️ Behind the scenes

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

Other changes:

- chore: Experiment with addressing some eslint errors by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3855
- refactor: improved HTML sanitization by @saberzero1 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3858


## New Contributors

* @saberzero1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3858

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/7.24.0...8.0.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**
- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>
releases.name: 8.0.0: Breaking change: JavaScript execution in Tasks queries now disabled by default

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### Most Notable

🌟 New **'Change status to...' commands** (thanks @chmac)

- A new set of commands to directly set a task's status to any specific registered status.
- See the documentation: ['Tasks: Toggle task done' command](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Editing/Toggling+and+Editing+Statuses#'Tasks+Change+status+to...'+commands)

🌟 New **'Task count location' setting** (thanks @beauraines)

- Choose whether the task count is shown at the top or bottom of query results.

🌟 New  **Brazilian Portuguese support** (thanks @a-deriva)

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

#### 🌟 Features

- feat: Add 'Set Status' commands (#1486) by @chmac in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3739
- feat: copy errors with copy button by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3803
- feat: add task count location setting (top or bottom) by @beauraines in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3779

#### 💪 Fixes

- fix: Correct alignment of left edge of status setting descriptions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3796
- fix: Add an onCanceled callback to allow resolving edit and create APIs by @justise in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3698
- fix: sort order of groups by date categories is now consistent by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3837
- fix: Correct order of groups like `task.happens.fromNow` for non-English setups by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3844

#### 🌍 Translations

- i18n: Add Brazilian Portuguese support by @a-deriva in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3833
- i18n: Clarifications & correctness of i18n mechanism by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3836

#### 📖 Documentation

- docs: state that errors are now copied by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3805
- docs: Document use of `task.listMarker` in custom filters by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3817

#### 🛠️ Dependencies

- chore(deps-dev): bump tslib from 2.6.2 to 2.8.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3521
- chore(deps-dev): bump builtin-modules from 3.3.0 to 5.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3522
- build(deps-dev): bump jest-environment-jsdom from 30.0.4 to 30.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3638
- chore(deps): bump lodash from 4.17.21 to 4.17.23 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3778
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3651
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3694
- build(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3659
- chore(deps): bump @floating-ui/dom from 1.6.12 to 1.7.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3583
- chore(deps): bump peter-evans/create-pull-request from 7 to 8 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3782
- chore(deps-dev): bump markdownlint-cli2 from 0.13.0 to 0.21.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3784
- chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.17.0 to 0.27.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3783
- chore(deps): bump flatted from 3.2.9 to 3.4.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3815
- chore(deps): bump immutable from 4.3.5 to 4.3.8 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3791
- chore(deps): bump lodash from 4.17.23 to 4.18.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3835
- chore(deps): bump undici from 6.21.3 to 6.24.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3810
- chore(deps): bump @floating-ui/dom from 1.7.5 to 1.7.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3789
- chore(deps-dev): bump typedoc from 0.27.4 to 0.27.9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3785

#### 🛠️ Behind the scenes

Many thanks to @saberzero1 for assistance with adopting the Obsidian ESLint plugin.

- chore: Add `integration_tests/`, capturing Obsidian's rendered HTML by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3802
- chore: Upgrade esbuild to 0.17.0 and migrate to context API by @beauraines in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3819
- chore: add cross-platform Node.js deploy script for local development by @beauraines in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3811
- chore: Adopt obsidian eslint (some rules disabled initially) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3853
- refactor: rename interface to `HtmlQueryRendererParameters` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3800
- refactor: shorter renderer lifetimes by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3801
- refactor: simplify construction of renderer objects by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3812

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/7.23.1...7.24.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**
- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>
releases.name: 7.24.0: 'Change status to...' commands, ability to show task count before the result & Brazilian Portuguese translation

releases.description: ## What's Changed Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you. ### Most Notable 🌟 New [toolbar](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Layout#Toolbar) on Tasks search results, with **'Filter by description' box** and **'Copy results'** button. 🌟 Ability to [hide fields](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Editing/Create+or+edit+Task#Customising+the+Modal) facility to the **'Create or edit Task' modal, for unused fields.** 🌟 Add [ON_HOLD](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Statuses/Status+Types#ON_HOLD) status type. 🌟 No more big red "Changing any settings requires a restart of obsidian"! - Changes to most of the Tasks [settings](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Settings) now **take immediate effect**. - A few remaining settings are marked with `REQUIRES RESTART`. 🌟 Add **Vietnamese translation** of 'Settings', 'Editing a Status' and 'Check your Statuses'. ### Main changes Here are the most notable user-visible changes. #### 🌟 Features - feat: add 'RESTART REQUIRED' to specific settings sections by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3635 - feat: Add 'Copy results' button to search results by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3658 - feat: copy results improvements by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3661 - feat: copy tree results by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3682 - feat: show/hide toolbar instruction by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3688 - feat: render explanation in Markdown by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3696 - feat: Add text box to filter searches by description by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3701 - feat: Add new ON_HOLD status type by @mdbraber in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3650 - feat: Add show/hide toolbar to Query File Defaults facility by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3710 - feat: make Edit Task modal fields optional by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3721 - feat: Speed up the search in results toolbar, by debouncing by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3731 - feat: Add toolbar to hide_query_elements preset, for new vaults by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3769 #### 💪 Fixes - fix: Correct typo in default presets: backinks => backlinks by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3666 - fix: copy button position by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3685 - fix: toggling query file defaults can show and hide fields again by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3704 - fix: copy results provides filtered results by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3705 - fix: Results filter now re-applied when settings or tasks edited by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3706 - fix: 'Tasks: Toggle task done' keeps list markers if no Global Filter (#3708) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3709 - fix: 'Tasks: Toggle task done' converts plain text straight to checkbox by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3711 - fix: Fix #3715 - occasionally corrupt search results with latest code by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3719 - fix: add '1 day' option if postponing future dates by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3723 - fix: display search errors by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3762 - fix: prevent accidental editing of dates in Task objects by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3767 #### 🌍 Translations - i18n: Adding Vietnamese translation in to Tasks by @congnvp in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3712 #### 📖 Documentation - docs: Show 'group by function' inheriting tags from parent task by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3649 - docs: Update snippets and examples in markdown by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3700 - docs: Write up the toolbar and 'hide unused fields' features by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3770 - docs: Add more info about ON_HOLD status type by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3773 - contrib: Add some examples of using SimulatedFile by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3655 #### 📂 Test Vault - vault: Add files to reproduce issue #3715 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3716 - vault: Update snippets and examples in markdown for #3741 fix by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3744 #### 🛠️ Behind the scenes Improvements made to new features prior to their release: Other changes: - chore: Update plugins in all vaults by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3654 - chore: Clarify and strengthen requirements for Pull Requests by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3752 - releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

* feat: redraw search results after global query is edited by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3596
* feat: re-read vault and redraw search results after global filter is edited by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3597

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: No longer break recurring tasks if scheduled dates are removed by @chmac in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3592
* fix: Enable themes to modify indentation in Live Preview (#3603) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3610
* fix: Update code & docs for new ITS Theme docs & status by @Happypig375 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3611
* fix: prevent mouse cursor becoming stuck in "scroll" mode when middle clicking a task backlink by @NatKarmios in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3628
* fix: Prevent native menu hiding Status context menu (#2739,#3582) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3629

**🌍 Translations**

* i18n: add Korean localization support by @Hong-Seungmin in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3609

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Document access to nested and object properties by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3581
* docs: Refine 'Priority of Dates' section for recurring tasks by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3598
* docs: String "return" in function returns "undefined" (#3625) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3626

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

**Links facility**

- **Obsidian links are now accessible** in custom searches, sorting and grouping.
- We plan to provide built-in instructions for these features in future.
- Written by @rhhub, and refined by @claremacrae and @ilandikov.
- See the [user documentation](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Links)

**Tasks API**

- The Tasks API can now **edit existing task lines**.
- Note that the caller needs to save the modified task line (or lines).
- Written by @justise.
- See the [user documentation](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Advanced/Tasks+Api).

**Fix Tasks on iOS and iPadOS versions 18.6 and 26 Public Beta 2**

- Fixed an issue reported by many uses, that Task was broken by/on **iPadOS/iOs 18.6** and **iPadOS/iOs 26 Public Beta 2**.
- Fixed by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3563

<details><summary>Details of the iPadOS/iOs bug</summary>

Here is a minimal reproduction, which can be pasted in the Obsidian Console.

The Tasks plugin uses code like the following very simplified example to parse Markdown lines:

```regexp
/⏳/u.test('🔺⏳')
/⏳/u.test('🔺 ⏳')
/⏳/u.test('🔺  ⏳')
```
It is expected that on all platforms, all the above 3 test examples should return `true`, saying that the character `⏳` is present in the test string.

In **iPadOS/iOs 18.6** and **iPadOS/iOs 26 Public Beta 2**, the **middle example - with a single space - wrongly returns false!!!**.

This completely breaks the Task plugin's parsing of task lines, in all the normal cases where there is only a single space between fields.
</details>

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

* feat: Add ability to filter and group by linked note by @rhhub in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3466
    * Additional contributions:
    * refactor: Minor refactoring of links code and tests by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3495
    * refactor: Rename `outLinks` getters to `outlinks` - changing unreleased code by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3520
    * feat: Add `outlinksInProperties` and `outlinksInBody` - `outlinks` returns both by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3526
    * feat: Add `Link.markdown` for reliable rendering of links by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3527
    * feature: Add `Link.isLinkTo()`, for easy 'filter by function' by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3542
    * feat: Add `Link.destinationPath` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3555
    * fix: `Link.isLinkTo()` now works when passed `TasksFile` objects by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3556
    * refactor: Rename `Link.isLinkTo()` to `Link.linksTo()` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3557
* feat: Add the ability to launch the task modal to edit an existing line by @justise in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3528

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Allow text selection with mouse in Preset settings by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3511
* fix: Allow other plugins to auto-suggest & document settings for this by @rhhub in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3503
* fix: Enable adding dependencies from modal created via API's createTaskLineModal() by @justise in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3509
* fix: Inline attachment previews are now visible in Live Preview and Reading modes by @ramarivera in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3498
* fix: Enable new iPad/iPhone OS versions to read Emoji tasks (#3546,#3560) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3563

**🌍 Translations**

* i18n: Update Chinese translation(zh_cn.json) by @aoaoho in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3501

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Initial documentation for Links feature by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3569

**🛠️ Dependencies**

* build(deps-dev): bump async-mutex from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3209
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild-svelte from 0.8.0 to 0.8.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3253
* chore(deps): bump nanoid from 3.3.7 to 3.3.8 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3234
* chore(deps): bump undici from 6.21.0 to 6.21.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3507
* chore(deps): bump rrule from 2.7.2 to 2.8.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3258
* chore(deps): bump @babel/runtime from 7.23.2 to 7.27.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3506
* chore(deps-dev): bump jest-environment-jsdom from 29.7.0 to 30.0.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3518

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

* test: Save the parsing diffs from Obsidian 1.9.2 to 1.9.4 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3517
* vault, tests: Visualise Obsidian, dataview & Tasks behaviour with #3481 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3516

## New Contributors

* @rhhub made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3466
* @aoaoho made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3501
* @justise made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3509
* @ramarivera made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3498

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/7.20.0...7.21.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

**Presets facility** (fixes [#2443](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/issues/2443) and [#2267](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/issues/2267))

* Presets allow you to **save commonly used task query instructions** and reuse them across multiple queries.
* Instead of repeatedly typing the same complex filters and sorting options, you can **define them once in settings and reference them by name**.
* For example, this is useful for **daily notes with standard task queries**, where you can now change search criteria in one place and have all your task views update automatically.

Written by @claremacrae and @ilandikov.
See the [user documentation](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Presets).


**Major performance boost**

* Tasks searches now only run when visible, and not on inactive tabs by (fixes [#2999](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/issues/2999)) @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3438

**Review and check your Statuses**

* The 'Review and check your Statuses' feature in Tasks Settings now adds sample tasks, so you can test your custom statuses easily, and check their styling by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3440

**Obsidian 1.9.x (Insiders) Users**

* Beware the **breaking changes in Obsidian**: See our guide [Missing tags, aliases and cssclasses in some Obsidian 1.9.x versions](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Support+and+Help/Missing+tags,+aliases+and+cssclasses+in+some+Obsidian+1.9.x+versions).

---

![settings-default-presets](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/33946f7c-c48c-4e49-a310-152e63435496)
_Screenshot of Default Presets_

---

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Support line continuations in TQ_extra_instructions & placeholders by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3450
* fix: Suppress Tasks Auto-Suggest in Task-Board plugin modal (#3475) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3477

**🌍 Translations**

* i18n: Ukrainian, Belarusian and Russian translations of sample tasks by @bav2653 and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3441
* i18n: Add German translation of settings UI by @i-am-the-slime and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3465

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Link Sorting.md to related section in Grouping.md by @adam in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3461
* docs: Write up observations on Obsidian 1.9.x property reading by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3491

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Some of the significant volume of work required to create the Presets feature ([originally called Includes](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks-contributing/Architecture+Decisions/ADR-001+-+Nomenclature+for+Reusable+Instruction+Blocks+Feature)):

* feat: Partial implementation of 'include' instruction by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3437
* feat: First try at editing named reusable task block statements by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3446
* feat: Add error-checking of duplicate names of "Includes" by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3460
* feat: Editing any Includes setting redraws open Tasks searches by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3463
* feat: Arrange the delete button in the includes settings by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3473
* feat: Allow Includes settings to be re-ordered by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3476
* feat!!: Rename 'include' facility to 'preset' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3485
* fix: Improve the layout of Includes section in settings by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3452
* fix: Includes settings now work on mobile and narrow windows by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3472

Other changes:

* refactor: add IncludesSettingsService class by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3457
* refactor: Improve the maintainability of `IncludesSettingsUI.scss` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3470

## New Contributors

* @adam made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3461

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/7.19.1...7.20.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**
- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>
releases.name: 7.20.0: Re-use query instructions in "Presets" - and big performance improvements

## What's Changed

Please run the **Reload app without saving** command or **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**



* Add **option to remove Scheduled date on new recurring tasks** by @chmac in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3423
    * ![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a990c0b8-2cb1-4a05-b3be-2fb711249e2e)
    * Use this setting to control whether the Scheduled date should be removed from the next occurrence. The Scheduled date is only removed the task also has a Start or Due date.
    * This is useful when you want the Start and Due dates to carry forward to the next recurrence, but you will set the Scheduled date in future, once you know when you intend to work on it.

**💪 Fixes**

* Stop `onCompletion: delete` leaving blank lines for non-recurring tasks by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3424

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**💪 Fixes**

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

* spike: Experimentally cache data from query.allTasks calculations by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3339

Other changes:

* chore: Run pre-commit checks on .svelte and json test data files by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3327
* contrib, chore: Improvements to setting up a build environment, mostly for vscode and windows. by @EanLombardo in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3337

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

- This release celebrates Tasks reaching **Two Million** downloads!
- Tasks now requires [Obsidian 1.4.0](https://obsidian.md/changelog/2023-07-26-desktop-v1.4.0/) or newer.
- **Translations**:
  - Add Chinese translation of Settings, Editing a Status and Check your Statuses.
  - To help with translation, visit [discussion #3321 on GitHub](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/discussions/3321) and subscribe.
- Use **standardised properties** in Query files to customise your searches:
  - New [Query File Defaults](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Query+File+Defaults) facility can quickly customise all Tasks searches in a file.
  - New ['Add all Query File Defaults properties' command](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Query+File+Defaults#Command+Add+all+Query+File+Defaults+properties)
  - Use the [Meta Bind plugin](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Other+Plugins/Meta+Bind+Plugin) to [make a query user interface](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/How+To/Make+a+query+user+interface).
- Use **custom properties** in Query files to customise your searches:
  - Add `query.file.hasProperty()` and `query.file.property()` in custom filters
  - Add `{{query.file.hasProperty()}}` and `{{query.file.property()}}` in placeholders - see [Using Query Properties in Placeholders](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Obsidian+Properties#Using+Query+Properties+in+Searches).
- [**Placeholders**](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Placeholders) can now contain functions and contain expressions.
- [**Roadmap**](https://github.com/orgs/obsidian-tasks-group/projects/4) reviewed and updated.
  - See items we have prioritised as being of most value to users, and to reduce our user-support workload.
  - It is just a rough guideline, mainly to convey the size of the backlog.
  - The volume of requests on the Tasks project is so large that it is impossible to say with any confident _if_ or _when_ any item might be done.

*Two million downloads...:*
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/17dd999a-7c87-47d2-ae4e-950cdd9388b6)


*Chinese translation of settings*:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/32d544ca-1ede-4853-a02a-5fe52becdc05)


*Quickly customise Tasks searches using Query File Defaults:*
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ed6e8ee8-d3d1-4215-b812-2f7c4cd2a6df)


*Quickly customise Tasks searches using the Meta Bind plugin:*
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5061bb31-a6c5-4c5b-aab0-287171c5879b)


### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

* feat: 'explain' shows effect of Line Continuations & Placeholders by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3221
* feat: partial support for `query.file.property()` and `query.file.hasProperty()` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3242
* feat: Placeholders can now contain expressions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3292
* feat: Add "Query File Defaults" facility by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3300
* feat: Simplify `explain` text by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3301
* feat: add new command `Add all Query File Defaults properties` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3317
* feat: Teach File Properties to recognise Tasks properties by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3318
* i18n: Chinese translation of Settings and related areas by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3285
* i18n: Enhance Chinese Translation by @dangehub in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3288

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Allow spaces after `show` and `hide` - and improve error message by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3213
* fix: Allow multi-line properties in `{{query.file.property('...')}}` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3245
* fix: Remove console error when line is deleted by 'Toggle task done' command by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3257
* fix: date picker in Reading mode & searches honours first day of week by @esm7 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3259
* fix: detect changes in query file path and query properties by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3281
* fix: Handle Enter key event for IME inputs by @ryotatake in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3272
* fix: render non-task list items in tree by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3291

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Fix URL in the help message for unexpanded template text by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3226
* docs: Update snippets and examples in markdown by @github-actions in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3246
* docs: Major enhancements to Query File Defaults docs by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3320

**🛠️ Dependencies**

* build(deps): bump @floating-ui/dom from 1.5.3 to 1.6.12 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3182
* build(deps): bump svelte-eslint-parser from 0.33.1 to 0.43.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3183
* build(deps-dev): bump obsidian API from 1.1.1 to 1.4.0 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3268

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Other changes:

* chore: Enable viewing Tasks source code with typedoc tool by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3229
* chore(deps-dev): bump madge from 6.1.0 to 8.0.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3254
* chore: Add development dependency on Fevol's obsidian-typings by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3269
* refactor: Reduce repetition of parsing of show/hide options by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3214
* refactor: Introduce FileParser class by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3224
* refactor: Add ListItem methods findClosestParentTask() and isTask() by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3228
* refactor: Improve QueryFileDefaults data maintainability by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3315
* refactor: Rename `'tasks_query_*'` properties to `'TQ_*'` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3316

## New Contributors

* @ryotatake made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3272
* @dangehub made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3288

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/7.14.0...7.15.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**
- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

**Use `show tree` instruction to show tasks as indented!**

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3fd589f-dc9a-4b17-8a93-ec4bbd47a162)

_Credit: Thanks to @stasmarkin for the original idea - and to @ilandikov for many excellent pair-programming sessions working on this..._

See [the documentation](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Layout#Hide+and+Show+Tree) to find out how it works.

**💪 Fixes**

* recur correctly at start of Daylight Savings Time by @ishanarora in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3121
* 'on completion' delete now renders correctly in Live Preview by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3145

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Document the show and hide tree instructions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3146

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Some of the many steps behind the `show tree` feature:

* feat: add experimental rendering of child tasks and list items by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3118
* fix: sub-list items now render OK - no bullet, number, callout/blockquote etc by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3119
* fix: rerender search results when child list items are edited by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3126
* feat: Add experimental 'show/hide tree' instruction - disabled by default by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3128
* fix: render markdown formatting in list items by @ilandikov and @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3135

Other changes:

* vault: Add manual test of recurrence in Pacific/Auckland at DST boundary by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3144

## New Contributors

* @ishanarora made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3121

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 "On Completion" action**

> [!tip]
> If you have ever wished that Tasks would automatically *do something* with the tasks that you complete (*especially* likely if you use recurring tasks, which tend to accumulate within the note that holds them), then the new [**"On Completion"**](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/On+Completion) feature could be the answer!

Here's what it looks like:

```
- [ ] Leave me alone
- [ ] Leave me alone too! 🏁 keep
- [ ] Delete me upon completion 🏁 delete
- [ ] Delete my completed instance  📅 2024-08-12 🔁 every day 🏁 delete
```

See the [documentation](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/On+Completion) for more info.

* New "On Completion" field with support for Delete automatic action by @therden in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2840
* Add 'keep' option to "On Completion" by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3016
* Teach Auto Suggest to support "On Completion" by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3028

**💪 Fixes**

* Render numbered sub-tasks and list items in Reading view by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3012
* Various improvements to cursor positions in Auto-Suggest by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3020
* Better dataview space & cursor in date Auto-Suggest by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3025

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

* refactor: Small improvements to the 'On Completion' implementation by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3010
* refactor: Refactor On Completion code and tests by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3015
* refactor: introduce parameter object to functions in Suggestor.ts by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3022
* refactor: Make the Auto Suggest code a bit easier to maintain by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3023

Other changes:

* fix: collect root `ListItem`s by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3008
* refactor: add `QueryResultsRenderer` class by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3018
* refactor: remove `QueryResultsRenderer` inheritance by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3027

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/7.7.0...7.8.0>

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Filter, sort and group by Obsidian Properties, also known as Frontmatter or YAML

Find tasks in Kanban plugin files:

```javascript
filter by function task.file.hasProperty('kanban-plugin')
```

Find tasks in files with value `project/project-1` in the `tags` property:

```javascript
filter by function task.file.property('tags').includes('#project/project-1')
```

For details and more examples, see the [Obsidian Properties](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Obsidian+Properties) documentation page.

### Other notable changes

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Simplify the top level of documentation by @claremacrae with @aubreyz in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2995
* contrib: add documentation on testing code that uses Obsidian API by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2976

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

* refactor: move `TasksFile` object to `TaskLocation` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2959
* fix: Prevent task.frontmatter.tags being null if no frontmatter by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2974
    * *Do not use this value - it is undocumented, and will change or be removed in a future release.*
* test: demo property custom searches by @ilandikov with @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2981
* feat: releasable code for accessing properties via `task.file` by @ilandikov with @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2991
* docs: Start documenting access to obsidian properties. by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2997
* docs: Update snippet in markdown by @github-actions in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2998
* docs: more work on properties documentation by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3001
* fix: Editing properties/frontmatter now updates Query results by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3003
* fix: Tasks in renamed files forgot about any properties/frontmatter values in the file by @claremacrae with @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/3005

Other changes:

* chore: Add Ilyas Landikov as co-author of Tasks by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2973
* refactor: remove nesting in `Recurrence.next()` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2970
* refactor: extract `nextOccurrence()` method and reuse it by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2975
* refactor: create `Occurrence` class by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2978
* refactor: move behaviour from `Recurrence` to `Occurrence` methods `isIdenticalTo()` and `getReferenceDate()` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2979
* refactor: move `referenceDate` field to `Occurrence` class by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2980
* refactor: create `nextOccurrence` and `nextOccurrenceDate` methods in `Occurrence` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2983
* refactor: move `Occurrence` class separate to a separate file and minor improvements by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2985
* refactor: simplify `Task.handleNewStatus()` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2992

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):

## What's Changed

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Tasks search results now render correctly in Tabs plugin by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2945 - thanks to @xhuajin for reporting the issue and finding the fix.

Tasks can now be used in the [Tabs plugin](https://github.com/xhuajin/obsidian-tabs)!

For example:

~~~
````tabs

tab: Todo

```tasks
folder includes Obsidian
not done
```

tab: Done

```tasks
folder includes Obsidian
done today
```

````
~~~


Might give:

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

#### New features

* Add `executeToggleTaskDoneCommand()` to Tasks Api by @mgmeyers in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2781
    * see the [interface](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Advanced/Tasks+Api#Tasks%20API%20Interface) and [description](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Advanced/Tasks+Api#%60executeToggleTaskDoneCommand+(line+string%2C+path+string)+%3D%3E+string%3B%60).
* Allow showing/suppressing the Auto-Suggest in custom editor implementations by @mgmeyers in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2778
    * see the [description](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Advanced/Tasks+Api#Auto-Suggest+Integration).
* Better Edit Modal on smaller screens by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2809
* Compacter look of recurrence, lines & dependencies in Edit Task modal by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2811

#### Bug fixes

* Align the look of `Priority` section in task modal with date sections by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2794
* Remove access keys mentions when access key setting is disabled by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2796

#### obsidian-tasks-custom-icons

Phil Ricketts - @replete - created a lovely CSS mechanism for compact, monochrome Tasks emojis, and shared it in [Discussion #1965](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/discussions/1965).

As Phil is no longer using this, we have transferred it over to the `obsidian-tasks-group` organisation, in the new location: [obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks-custom-icons](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks-custom-icons). Many thanks Phil for all the work on this.

We are now looking for someone with design experience to help [add support for some extra emojies](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks-custom-icons/issues). Contact @claremacrae if you would like to know more.

### Coming soon...

Auto-suggest for task dependencies is **coming soon**, with just a little more polishing before release.

* feat: Add Auto Suggest for Task dependencies by @Genei180 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2771
* test: Add some tests for dependency suggestions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2806
* fix: Test and improve behaviour of auto-suggest with dependencies by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2826
* fix: Disable auto-suggest for dependencies to allow 7.2.0 release by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2828

### Other changes

Here are the other user-visible changes.

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: fix typo in Task Dependencies.md by @kgeis in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2792
* docs: Update snippets and examples in markdown by @github-actions in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2802
* contrib: Document the source-code directory structure by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2800

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

Other changes:

* refactor: group CSS classes by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2791
* refactor: reorder CSS classes in `EditTasks.scss` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2793
* refactor: clean `EditTask.scss` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2799
* refactor: split CSS class `tasks-modal-section` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2804
* refactor: finalise CSS split in `EditTask.scss by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2812
* refactor: add ListItem class by @stasmarkin in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2819
* refactor: extract label generation for Edit Task modal by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2822
* refactor: extract `StatusEditor` component from Edit Task modal by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2831

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

---

### Breaking change

**⚠️ Important** This release is number 7.0.0 because significant improvements to the Boolean code required a tiny breaking change, to a feature that we expect was hardly used.

Any Boolean filters with **mixed delimiters**, like this, will now give an error:

```text
(not done) AND "is recurring"
```

They must be changed to use **consistent delimiters**. Example fixed lines:

```text
(not done) AND (is recurring)
"not done" AND "is recurring"
```

See [Breaking Changes](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Support+and+Help/Breaking+Changes#Tasks%207.0.0%20(14%20April%202024)) for full details of these changes.

### Boolean filters radically improved

Boolean filters can now contain parentheses -  `(....)`- and double quotes - `"` - **so long as the sub-expressions do not end with any closing delimiters**.

The [Troubleshooting Boolean Filters](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Support+and+Help/Breaking+Changes#Tasks%207.0.0%20(14%20April%202024)) guide shows patterns to use, to get any Boolean filter to work now, however complex.

**Breaking change:**

* Disallow mixing delimiter types in Boolean queries by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2762

**New features:**

* Provide better Boolean help messages by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2761
* Support square brackets and curly braces to surround Boolean sub-expressions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2763
* Fix any missing spaces around Boolean operators by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2767
* Further improve Boolean help messages by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2770

**Bug fixes:**

* 'explain' omitted the instruction line in some Boolean expressions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2719
* allow Boolean filters such as "description includes abc" by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2755
* allow filters with ( ) and " delimiters in Boolean filters by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2759

**Documentation**: [Combining Filters - Tasks User Guide - Obsidian Publish](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Combining+Filters)

### Main changes

Here are the other most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

* Add timing code to Tasks code block rendering code by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2740
    * See [Console timing facilities in Tasks](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks-contributing/Debugging/Console+timing+facilities+in+Tasks) in the Contributing guide.

**📖 Documentation**

* Add Resources page by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2733
* Document many improvements to Boolean searches by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2772

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

Other changes:

* refactor: adopt SASS and break up styles.css file by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2717
* refactor: move `TasksFile` object to `TaskLocation` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2752
* refactor: Introduce BooleanDelimiters class by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2754
* refactor: Start new code for preprocessing Boolean instructions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2756
* refactor: Implement new preprocessor for Boolean searches by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2758
* vault: Speed up rendering in the Tasks demo vault by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2741
* vault: explore parent child tasks with dataview by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2769

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/6.2.0...7.0.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**
- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

**🌟 New team member: Ilyas Landikov**

I'm delighted to announce that @ilandikov - Ilyas Landikov - has joined me as a core contributor to the Tasks plugin.

He has been working tirelessly behind the scenes for the last year, and it really helps to have somebody to discuss ideas and issues with, and to help improve the visible and hidden quality of the code and its tests.

Thank you Ilyas, and a warm welcome!

**🌟 Edit Task modal status-editing is fixed**

Editing task statuses via the modal now correctly updates Done and Cancelled dates, and creates the next task when completing a recurring task.

Thanks to @ilandikov for invaluable help writing the first test for this.

![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/aa44eb5d-2411-436a-a3df-6643c7412fa1)



**🌟 Task Dependencies facility** - thank you @DanielTMolloy919!

The Tasks plugin now allows for 'Finish to start (FS)' dependencies, meaning Task A needs to be finished before you start on Task B. You can learn more about this concept [on Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dependency_(project_management)).

- User Documentation: [Task Dependencies](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Task+Dependencies)
- *Below: Documentation sample: Editing Dependencies*
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/d2de776b-01d4-429d-9250-717858ff17b9)
- *Below: Documentation sample: Search Concepts for Dependencies*
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/1cdf7713-22a9-4de1-8890-e8cdb4a1ce11)






---

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

* Implement Task Dependencies by @DanielTMolloy919 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2568

**📖 Documentation**

User documentation:

* Use dates other than 'today' with Daily Notes core plugin by @YuShigurey in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2677
* Finish documenting Task Dependencies by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2688
* Document how to find tasks with invalid recurrence rules by @claremacrae in 08bf7843aac695506ae7d379c72d49d918b4b0b1
* Add more links to 'Finding unread emojis' by @claremacrae in a9441da0cd3d0ab0de7b98aa9f54fb5048581ac1
* The table of Auto-Suggest keywords is now machine-generated and complete by @claremacrae in 955475c75100c53a536cf5f89ef473ed8122180b

Contributing guide:

* Added [Debugging and Performance tools](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks-contributing/Debugging/Debugging+and+Performance+tools)

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

* feat: Improve the wording of placeholders for Dependency fields by @claremacrae in 8ccd04a67c51680bfd271e7453ebf465a937df6b
* feat: Set unique access key for 'After this' field in Edit Task modal by @claremacrae in ffb2efe6b44b44ccbd304527078125855b640daa

* fix!!: Rename field to Task.dependsOn to fix "blocked by" ambiguity by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2639

Other changes:

* refactor: `TaskLayout`& `QueryLayout` renames by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2613
* refactor: Create Task.isBlocked() and Task.isBlocking() by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2632

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

---

**⚠️ Important** This release is number 6.0.0 because of significant improvements to:

- the default sort order
- how invalid dates are handled
- styling of the Pencil and Postpone buttons (thank you @Cito)

See [Breaking Changes](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Support+and+Help/Breaking+Changes#Tasks+6.0.0+(19+January+2024)) for full details of these changes.

---

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

- Added `sort by function`, for **custom sorting**
- See [Custom Sorting](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Custom+Sorting)

Examples:

```javascript
sort by function task.tags.filter( (tag) => tag.includes("#context/")).sort().join(",")
```

- Sort by tags that contain `#context/`.
- Any tasks without that tag are sorted first.

```javascript
sort by function reverse task.tags.length
```

- Sort by the number of tags on the task.
- The `reverse` option puts tasks with the most tags first.

```javascript
sort by function task.file.path === query.file.path
```

- Tasks in the same file as the query will be sorted before all other tasks.

```javascript
sort by function task.description.length
```

- Sort by length of description, shortest first.

Commits:

* Add 'sort by function' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2577
* Complete implementation of 'sort by function' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2584
* Enable use of Query Properties like query.file.path in 'sort by function' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2586
* 'sort by function' now sorts 'true' before 'false' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2597
* docs: Document custom sorting and `sort by function` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2604

**💪 Fixes**

**⚠️ Important** The following are all improvements to existing behaviour that may change the sorting and grouping of search results. See [Breaking Changes](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Support+and+Help/Breaking+Changes#Tasks+6.0.0+(19+January+2024)) for full details.

* Use similar styling for Edit and Postpone buttons by @Cito in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2562
* Make default sort order sort first by status type by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2599

Better handling of invalid dates:

* Sort invalid dates before valid ones in query results by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2590
* `task.due.category` and `task.due.fromNow` now handle invalid dates by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2593
* `group by [date]` now puts `Invalid [date] date` as first heading by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2595
* Make `happens` date now ignore invalid dates by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2596
* Make the Urgency calculation ignore invalid dates by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2600

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

* refactor: rewrite TaskLayoutOptions to key on TaskLayoutComponent by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2575
* refactor: cleanup `TaskLayout.ts` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2578

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/5.6.0...6.0.0>

**🙏 Support Tasks development**
- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>
releases.name: 6.0.0: Custom sorting, improve default sort order and handling of invalid dates

releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### 🌟 Most Notable

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

- 🌟 **New  `cancelled date` field added**
    - `- [-] take out the trash ❌ 2023-04-18`
    - `- [-] take out the trash  [cancelled:: 2023-04-18]`
    - It's enabled in settings by default - and can be turned off.
    - It's added automatically via all of the following, when the next status type is CANCELLED:
        - Toggling tasks with mouse
        - Running the 'Tasks: Toggle task done' command
        - 'Change task status' context menu
    - The value can be edited in the Edit task modal.
    - Tasks already supports filtering, sorting and grouping by `cancelled` date.
    - [Docs - for the field](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Dates#Cancelled+date) - which links to filter, sort and group docs too.
    - [Find tasks with potentially invalid data](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/How+To/Find+tasks+with+invalid+data) updated for `created` and other recently added fields.
- 🌟 **Edit task Modal improvements**
    - `created`, `done` and `cancelled` dates can all now be edited.
    - There is now a warning displayed, about limitations of changing status in the modal.
    - On small screens, the `Apply` and `Cancel` buttons are now always visible. Thank you @DanielTMolloy919.
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/c28987d3-40d4-442d-9f01-18a22cfccddb)

**🌟 Features**

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **quit and restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

**🌟 Easily postpone tasks that have dates.** Thanks @m0rtyn and @ilandikov

- New 'postpone button' in search results - with click and right-click actions.
- Defer Due, Scheduled or Start dates.
- Docs: [Postponing](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Editing/Postponing)
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/3cef8885-88f2-4ffb-af34-3362474b6f17)
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/7b1c9cb3-718c-474c-9331-ea6652de92b8)


**🌟 New "change task status" context menu.** Thanks @chrabia

- Right-click on checkboxes in Reading mode and search results
- Honours 'done date' setting and recurring tasks.
- Docs: ['Change task status' context menu](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Editing/Toggling+and+Editing+Statuses#'Change+task+status'+context+menu)
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/d705bb77-54f5-4edb-bfe3-1bb9dcc9048c)


**🌟 Add Tasks docs to the HelpMate plugin**

- View the latest Tasks documentation in a side-panel right inside your vault.
- The [HelpMate plugin](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-HelpMate)  provides a lovely way to view plugin docs inside your vault.
- And now it knows how to find the Tasks documentation.
    ![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/59aeada6-bbf0-4107-9f25-d6c89de487a5)


### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟 Features**

* feat: Add a button, with context menu, to "postpone" tasks by @m0rtyn in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2191
* feat: add "change task status" context menu by @chrabia in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2476
* feat: Add Tasks docs to the HelpMate plugin by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2466


**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Debug logging in File.ts works; better logging by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2472
* fix: Correctly indent Tasks search results in Live Preview by @claremacrae - with the fix supplied by @mackaaij! in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2489
* perf: Do not index attachments after plugin has loaded by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2465

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: fix typo about comment tasks in getting-started by @PikaBlue107 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2475
* docs: Fix typo by @rdimaio in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2477
* docs: Create new 'Editing/' section in the documentation by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2492
* docs: Document 'show/hide postpone button' instruction  by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/commit/c5ca925d0475329fd48df894090150999fe7500a  
* docs: Document the Postpone button  by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/commit/9a07044f37269d5c7f27de7ac2ca997989454696  
* docs: Document 'Change task status' context menu in major new page  by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/commit/7deb2f93fc6b93f37b6f2de91ed264743be64273
* vault: Update plugins in Tasks-Demo vault by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2468
* vault: Install the HelpMate plugin, to access Tasks help by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2469

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

Improvements made to new features prior to their release:

* feat: Enable postponing of start dates by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2454
* feat: postponement usability improvements by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2455
* feat: hide postpone button if happens date absent or invalid by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2485

* feat: Experimental changes to (unreleased) Postpone menu options by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2497
* fix: Postponing now works repeatedly by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2486
* fix: better menu items to postpone future dates by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2499
* fix: can now postpone scheduled dates from file name by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2500
* fix: prevent postpone from overwriting invalid dates. by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2501
* fix: Bug-fixes and tests for the new Statuses context menu by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2508

Other changes:

* internal: Add Priorities menu (not yet used anywhere in the plugin) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2495
* refactor: Extract functions from postpone code, and start testing by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2453
* refactor: fix async/await warnings in QueryRenderer.ts by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2470
* refactor: Rename postpone symbols and standardise parameter order by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2483

* refactor: modify componentString variable closer to its usage by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2488
* refactor: rename variables in postpone code by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2490
* test: add tests for `shouldShowPostponeButton()` against Task dates by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2474
* test: test postponed task and date creation by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2473
* test: improve TaskLineRenderer tests by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2494
* test: group TaskLineRenderer tests by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2498

## New Contributors

* @m0rtyn made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2191
* @mathisgauthey made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2467

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):

## What's Changed

Most query instructions can now contain capital letters. Thank you @vdusart.

For example:

    ```tasks
    not done
    due AFTER yesterday
    due BEFORE in two weeks
    ```

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🎉 Custom filters and groups can access `query.file.path` and friends directly**

They no longer need `{{` and `}}` placeholders and quotes.

- See page [Query Properties](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Query+Properties)

For example:

```javascript  
filter by function task.file.folder.includes( query.file.folder )  
```  

- Find tasks in files in the folder that contains the query **and any sub-folders**.

```javascript  
filter by function task.file.folder === query.file.folder  
```  

- Find tasks in files in the folder that contains the query only (**not tasks in any sub-folders**).

**🎉 Check and visualise your Custom Statuses**

* Using the **'Review and check your Statuses' button** in Tasks' Status Settings.
* See page [Check your Statuses](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Getting+Started/Statuses/Check+your+Statuses)

For example:

![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/1cb2b8e3-91dd-4c29-b35c-de9c996b45ab)


The commits:

* feat: Custom grouping accesses Query Properties directly, without Placeholders by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2377
* feat: Custom filters access Query Properties directly, without Placeholders by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2378
* feat: Enable visualisation of the Status settings by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2383
* feat: Statuses report now shows a Status Settings table by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2385
* feat: Enable logging configuration by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2393 - thanks to @sytone for the initial code for this
* feat: Add optional debug logging of searches and file handling by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2397
* feat: "Review and check your Statuses" now shows any problems by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2399
* feat: Colour-code the Mermaid status diagrams for readability by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2400

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Correct (unreleased) display of special chars in Mermaid status diagrams by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2382
* fix: 'Add All Unknown Status Types' now sorts new statuses by symbol by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2384
* fix: Allow indenting tasks while suggest popup present by @CamerAllan in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2362 - thanks also to @RyotaUshio for [help on the Forum](https://forum.obsidian.md/t/editorsuggest-eats-tabs-and-other-characters-probably-shouldnt/69728/2?u=camerallan).
* fix: hide blockid in reading view by @theotheo in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2368

**📖 Documentation**

* docs: Update docs for 'filter by function' accessing query properties by @claremacrae in dfe0b9928dfcf2c1abbf9fe49429ef9bf3d9137d
* docs: Fix typo in grouping.md (filenameWithoutExtension) by @andrewmwhite in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2369
* docs: Document 'Review and check your Statuses' report by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2406
* contrib: Try improving the 'Local development.md' formatting. by @claremacrae in 4c582802111e611da8e18b1972c5049f9e0741b0
* contrib: Cross-link between 'Local development.md' and 'Setting up build environment.md' by @claremacrae in b637e348324f68122a19707da5ed137aed41f1c3
* vault: Remove the 'ASCII Tasks Table' from the Tasks-Demo vault by @claremacrae in 54e6bfd15b03d69d1b64a301172136c3047979cb

**🛠️ Behind the scenes**

* chore: Update to ApprovalTests 6.2.4 by @claremacrae in c4f4750d1d8ebd5ee54ba7143aeec0e70dae5e40
* refactor: Introduce (empty) SearchInfo class by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2373
* refactor: SearchInfo now contains list of tasks being searched by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2374
* refactor: Add SearchInfo param to GrouperFunction by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2376
* test: Add JestReporter as fallback diff tool - will help CI builds by @claremacrae in 95f28197d9e73173832efc3e1121f11763dbf112
* test: Add AutoApprovingReporter, to update failing tests then review git diffs by @claremacrae in e014c7276619d3b56914196380e290e038be9333
* test: add task rendering HTML approval tests by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2405
* test: include description and tags in Visualise HTML tests by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2407

## New Contributors

* @andrewmwhite made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2369
* @CamerAllan made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2362
