If your vault has any lines in Task blocks that end in `\` please make the following kind of change: | Old instruction | Use this instruction instead | | --------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- | | `description includes something\` | `description includes something\\` | --- ### Main changes Here are the most notable user-visible changes. **🎉 Long query lines can now be split with backslashes** by @sbliven in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2330 - See page [Line Continuations](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Line+Continuations) - Here is a before-and-after example image from the documentation (which now uses syntax-highlighting in some examples, for readability):

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Dependencies have been updated. Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

- **Added more query file properties**
    - `query.file.pathWithoutExtension`
    - `query.file.filenameWithoutExtension`
    - [docs: Values for Query File Properties](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Query+Properties#Values+for+Query+File+Properties)
- **Added more task file properties**
    - `task.file.pathWithoutExtension`
    - `task.file.filenameWithoutExtension`
    - [docs: Values for Task File Properties](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Task+Properties#Values+for+File+Properties)
- **Add hyperlink to `group by backlink` headings** (thanks, @ilandikov)
    - As well as jumping to the relevant heading, it also shows a hover preview of the section containing the task(s)
- **Add total task count to `show task count` display**
    - If a `limit` instruction means not all matching tasks are shown, the total tasks count is shown, such as `50 of 686 tasks`.
    - This is useful when combined with `limit 0` if you just want to see how many tasks match your query.
    - [docs: Limiting](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Limiting)

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes, and the more significant internal ones.

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Scripting enables removing file extension from path and filename properties by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2288
* feat: `group by backlink` headings link to location & show hover previews by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2285
* feat: `show task count` now shows total, if 'limit' applied by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2301

**🛠️  Dependencies**

* chore(deps): bump rrule from 2.7.1 to 2.7.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2120
* chore(deps): bump word-wrap from 1.2.3 to 1.2.5 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2291
* chore(deps-dev): bump ts-jest from 29.1.0 to 29.1.1 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2122
* chore(deps): bump boon-js from 2.0.3 to 2.0.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2121
* build(deps): bump @adobe/css-tools from 4.2.0 to 4.3.1 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2240
* build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 3 to 4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2248

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* chore: Fix error TS5055: Cannot write file ...tests/global-setup.js by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2277
* chore: automate detection of circular code dependencies by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2295
* chore: Specify supported node versions in package.json by @axelson in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2065
* refactor: Introduce GlobalQuery class: the plugin uses a singleton. by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2215
* refactor: Remove recently-added cyclic dependencies. by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2279
* refactor: Separate settings out of GlobalFilter by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2282
* refactor: remove unused return value in `createTasksList()` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2280
* refactor: Add getInstance() to GlobalFilter & make all else non-static by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2283
* refactor: Convert one use of GlobalFilter.getInstance() to instance by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2286
* refactor: remove cyclic dependencies & optional parameter in `TaskLineRenderer.ts` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2284
* refactor: extract data attribute names dictionary from `getComponentDataAttribute()` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2255
* refactor: remove destructured object and return in createTaskList() by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2293
* refactor: remove destructured types in Query.ts by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2292
* refactor: move code for task counts text to QueryResult by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2300

## New Contributors
* @axelson made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2065

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### 🌟  Use Query file path, folder, root and name in queries directly 🌟

* support **placeholders** like `{{query.file.path}}` in queries by @claremacrae and @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2254
    * no more need to use dataview to access query file information
* examples:
    * `folder includes {{query.file.folder}}`
      * Find tasks in files in the folder that contains the query **and any sub-folders**.
    * ```filter by function task.file.folder.includes( '{{query.file.folder}}' )```
      * Find tasks in files in the folder that contains the query **and any sub-folders**.
      * Note that the placeholder text is expanded to a raw string, so needs to be inside quotes.
    * ```filter by function task.file.folder === '{{query.file.folder}}'```
      * Find tasks in files in the folder that contains the query only (**not tasks in any sub-folders**).
* docs:
    * [How to get all tasks in the current file](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/How+To/How+to+get+tasks+in+current+file)
    * [Placeholders](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Placeholders)
    * [Query Properties](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Query+Properties)

### Other changes

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* refactor: separate concerns in `TaskLayout.ApplyOptions()` by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2235
* test: enable combination-testing of async code by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2251
* test: refactoring to simplify EditTask.test.ts by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2253

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
* https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/4.6.1...4.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟  Features**

* feat: **Support variables and more in custom filters and groups** by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2179

The following can now be used in `filter by function` and `group by function`:

- Named variables
- Functions
- `if` statements
- `return`

There are some simple examples in [the Expressions docs page](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Expressions#More+complex+expressions).

For example, Before:

```python
# 4 places need updating to change from using task.due to, say, task.happens:
group by function (!task.due.moment) ? '%%4%% ==Undated==' : task.due.moment.isBefore(moment(), 'day') ? '%%1%% ==Overdue==' : task.due.moment.isSame(moment(), 'day') ? '%%2%% ==Today==' : '%%3%% ==Future=='
```

After:

```python
# Only 1 place needs updating to change from using task.due to, say, task.happens:
group by function const date = task.due.moment; return (!date) ? '%%4%% ==Undated==' : date.isBefore(moment(), 'day') ? '%%1%% ==Overdue==' : date.isSame(moment(), 'day') ? '%%2%% ==Today==' : '%%3%% ==Future=='
```

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/4.3.0...4.4.0>
releases.name: 4.4.0: custom groups and filters support variables, functions, if and return statements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Dependencies have been updated. Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

**🌟 Major safety and usability improvements for regular expressions (regex) searches**

- `/` characters no longer need to be escaped (as `\/`) in regular expressions.
    - This fixes #2136 - that file paths in regular expressions were wrongly truncated.
- `explain` now explains regular expressions.
- It's easier to correct syntax errors in regexes, as error info is now displayed, such as:
    - `SyntaxError: Invalid regular expression: /hello(/: Unterminated group`
- The `u` unicode flag is now supported.
- Any invalid flags are reported now instead of ignored.
    - These are often a sign of a missing `/` at the end of the regex.
- Any problems with regex result in the following 'help' being displayed inside Tasks code blocks:
    ![image|500](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/e97a1d05-6a52-4291-8512-fb39b2d675f8)

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟  Features**

* feat: query error messages now show problem line by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2128
* feat: explain now shows regex interpretation by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2132
* feat: Show help message for invalid regular expressions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2139

**💪   Fixes**

* fix: Display reason for any failure to read regex by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2134
* fix: Support 'u' flag (Unicode) & detect duplicate flags by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2135

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

**🌟 `filter by function` custom filters!** - by @claremacrae

- A powerful, flexible mechanism to give users total control over task filtering.
- [Docs](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Custom+Filters)

Some example custom filters, several of which were not previously possible:

```python
# Find tasks due on Tuesdays, that is, any Tuesday.
filter by function task.due.format('dddd') === 'Tuesday'

# Find tasks that toggle to themselves, because the next symbol is the same as the current symbol.
filter by function task.status.symbol === task.status.nextSymbol

# Find tasks with more than one tag (other than any global filter)
filter by function task.tags.length > 1

# Find tasks with an urgency score between 8.0 and 11.0, inclusive.
filter by function task.urgency > 7.9999 && task.urgency < 11.0001

# Find tasks with any urgency other than the default score of 1.95.
filter by function task.urgency.toFixed(2) !== 1.95.toFixed(2)

# Find tasks that have a broken/invalid recurrence rule.
filter by function (!task.isRecurring) && task.originalMarkdown.includes('🔁')
```


---

### 🙏 Supporting Tasks development (Optional!)
 
The Tasks plugin is completely free to use, and very willingly developed and supported by Clare Macrae since May 2022.

Making the `filter by function` facility so well documented and usable, and this thoroughly tested, has been many, many days of work. It opens up some very exciting future capabilities.

If you would like to support Tasks development, and are able to do so, please see:

- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>

Donations will go towards my computing costs and licenses for development tools that I use for productivity. Thank you 🙏.

---



### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Add `task.descriptionWithoutTags` for `group by function` and `filter by function` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2094
* feat: Add `filter by function` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2097
* feat: Tasks code block now shows any error messages from searches by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2098

**📖  Documentation**

* docs: How to create groups Overdue, Today, Future & Undated by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2110
* docs: Finish docs for `filter by function` custom filters feature by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2114

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* refactor: Divide up `evaluateExpression()` for re-use by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2095
* refactor: Add `TaskExpression` to encapsulate `Expression` functions by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2096

**Full Changelog** (including changes too small to note above, and that do not affect the behaviour of the plugin itself):
- <https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/4.1.0...4.2.0>

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Please **restart Obsidian** after updating the plugin. Thank you.

### Most notable

**⚠️ Important** `group by urgency` now puts most urgent tasks first, not last.

If your vault uses `group by urgency`, please update your query blocks like this:

| Old instruction            | Use this instruction instead |
| -------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| `group by urgency reverse` | `group by urgency`           |
| `group by urgency`         | `group by urgency reverse`   |

**🌟 `group by function` custom groups!** - by @claremacrae and @hauntedhost

- A powerful, flexible mechanism to give users total control over task grouping.
- Credit: This work was only made possible by @hauntedhost, who kindly taught me how to evaluate user-supplied functions in TypeScript.
- [Docs](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Scripting/Custom+Grouping)

Some example custom groups:

```python
# Group by due date year and month number
group by function task.due.format("YYYY-MM")

# Group by any tags that contain "#context/"
group by function task.tags.filter( (tag) => tag.includes("#context/") )

# The opposite: create headings for all tags that do not contain "#tag".
group by function task.tags.filter( (tag) => ! tag.includes("#tag") )
```

You can also embed formatting in the group names, as markdown there is rendered.
For example, see the paler text in these group headings:

![image](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/assets/4840096/ba4ec48a-ea11-42c8-b8b0-b3435ba01492)


---

### 🙏 Supporting Tasks development (Optional!)
 
The Tasks plugin is completely free to use, and very willingly developed and supported by Clare Macrae since May 2022.

Making the `group by function` facility so well documented and usable, and this thoroughly tested, has been many, many days of work. It opens up some very exciting future capabilities.

If you would like to support Tasks development, and are able to do so, please see:

- <https://github.com/sponsors/claremacrae>

Donations will go towards my computing costs and licenses for development tools that I use for productivity. Thank you 🙏.

---

### Main changes

Here are the most notable user-visible changes.

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Add custom grouping, with `group by function` option by @claremacrae and @hauntedhost in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2028
* feat: Add TasksDate class for use in `group by function` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2032
* feat: `group by priority` names are now more readable by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2047
* feat: `group by status.type` names are now more readable by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2045

**💪   Fixes**

* fix: Stop bundling Moment in release by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2016
* fix: 'remove global filter' broke display of sub-tags of global filter by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2022
* fix!!: `group by urgency` now puts most urgent tasks first, not last by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2046

**📖  Documentation**

* docs: Add Scripting column to Quick Reference, showing property names by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2033
* docs: Update snippets and examples in markdown by @github-actions in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2048
* contrib: Update snippets and examples in markdown by @github-actions in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2002

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* chore: Automate content generation of some Priority docs by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2011
* chore(deps): bump peter-evans/create-pull-request from 3 to 5 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2004
* chore: Fix "Cannot write file '....../global-setup.js' errors'" by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2008
* chore(deps-dev): bump @types/jest from 29.5.1 to 29.5.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2005
* test: add custom matcher to test group sort order by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1999
* test: Add TaskBuilder.createFullyPopulatedTask() by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2013
* test: add group sort order tests by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/2024

## New Contributors

## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

 **Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin.**  Thank you.

releases.description:
## What's Changed

**Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

### 🌟 Reading either Dataview or Tasks Emoji formats

- Tasks can now read and write:
    - **EITHER** the existing **Tasks Emoji format**
    - **OR** the **Dataview plugin's bracketed inline fields** on task lines!
- This is a whole-vault setting, and a step on the way to support of both Dataview and Tasks formats simultaneously.
- Essential reading: [About Task Formats](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Reference/Task+Formats/About+Task+Formats) and [Dataview Format](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Reference/Task+Formats/Dataview+Format)
- Many thanks to @kedestin for implementing this long-requested feature.

### 💪 Fixed some searches for past dates

- **Fixed**: Queries like `due last Wednesday` and `due this monday` can once again match tasks with dates before today
- If you are using a version of Tasks **newer than 1.25.0**, **please do update**.
- Many thanks to @PSFHU for finding and reporting the issue, and @ilandikov for assistance fixing it.

### Full List

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Add support for either Dataview OR Tasks emoji task formats by @kedestin in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1824

**💪   Fixes**

* fix: Enable queries like 'due last Wednesday' to search dates before today by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1903

**📖  Documentation**

* docs: Document Task formats, including Dataview format support by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1895

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* chore: Use Templater plugin to add documentation snippets by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1888

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/3.2.0...3.3.0
releases.name: 3.3.0 - Now with added Dataview format support!

releases.description:
### ⚠️ Version 2.0.0: See notes below to review selected Date Searches

**Major improvements to date searches** have **changed results of some previously misleading searches**. Details below.

### 🌟 Most Notable

**Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

- 🌟 [**New Roadmap board**](https://github.com/orgs/obsidian-tasks-group/projects/4/views/1) - currently showing what is work-in-progress.
- 🌟 [**New Contributing Site**](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks-contributing/Welcome) - helping developers contribute to the Tasks project.
- 🌟 **Added searching of date ranges** - thanks @ilandikov
    - Absolute and relative date ranges, for example:
    - `done (before, after, in) YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD`
    - `done (before, after, in) (last, this, next) (week, month, quarter, year)`
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/filters/#searching-date-ranges)
    - **⚠️ Important**: some date search results now give different, improved results
        - Review the [**comprehensive list of changes in date search results**](https://publish.obsidian.md/tasks/Queries/Filters#Appendix%3A+Tasks+2.0.0+improvements+to+date+filters) to decide if you need to update any of your existing tasks searches.
- 🌟 **Added new  optional `created` field added** - thanks @vanadium23
    - `- [ ] take out the trash ➕ 2021-04-09`
    - Enable it in settings
    - then it's added automatically by:
        - [‘Create or edit Task’ Modal](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/create-or-edit-task/), when it creates a brand new task
        - and when you complete a [recurring task](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/recurring-tasks/)
    - It already supports filtering, sorting and grouping
    - [Docs - for the field](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/dates/#-created)
    - [Docs - for searching](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/filters/#created-date)
- 🌟 **Added new tag filters** - thanks @ilandikov
    - `has tags`
    - `no tags`
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/filters/#tags)
- 🌟 **Added new public API to retrieve markdown string for a new task via the 'Add or edit task' modal** - thanks @3bit
    - Authors of other plugins can now use the Tasks modal to prompt users for data for a new task
    - Feedback appreciated on this feature!
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/advanced/api/) show how to use this from the [QuickAdd](https://github.com/chhoumann/quickadd) plugin to automatically add tasks to a specific file.
- 💪 **Fixed some bugs which caused toggling of tasks in Reading view to sometimes write the updated task on the wrong line** - thanks @BluBloos for getting this started
- 💪 **Fixed rendering of Tasks query blocks in Obsidian Canvas** - thanks @ilandikov (and to @gypsyav for reporting the problem)
- 💪 **Fixed 'short mode' tooltip hiding task data** - thanks @HynDuf

### Full List

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Teach DateParser to read date ranges by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1683
* feat: Add visual debugging aids for Tasks developers by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1695
* feat: Show notice if there's a problem toggling task by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1697
* feat: add created date to task by @vanadium23 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1723
* feat: Add searches on date ranges by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1734
* feat: Add filter, group and sorting for created date by @vanadium23 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1744
* feat: Add created date to EditTask modal by @vanadium23 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1745
* feat: Add public API to retrieve markdown string for a new task via the Task UI by @3bit in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1736
* feat: Add filters for tag presence and absence by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1749
* feat: ‘Create or edit Task’ Modal usability improvements by @3bit in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1762

**💪   Fixes**

* fix: Prevent rare overwrite of wrong line in Reading mode & results blocks by @BluBloos in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1663
* fix: Prevent reading stale file data when replacing task by @BluBloos in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1672
* fix: Simplify cursor repositioning during the 'ToggleDone' command by @kedestin in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1712
* fix: render Tasks in canvas by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1733
* fix: Tooltip pop up above the description of task in short mode by @HynDuf in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1735
* fix: Prevent exception if toggling in unsaved file in Reading mode by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1772
* fix: Major improvements to toggling tasks in Reading view by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1780

**📖  Documentation**

* docs: Finalise docs for 'created date' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1750
* docs: Add more info to API docs by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1752
* docs: Fix a broken link I created in #1752 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1753
* docs: Adopt 'absolute' & 'relative' dates instead of 'formal & natural language' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1754
* docs: add date range examples by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1755
* docs: Update description field docs for #1762 improvements by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1781
* docs: Add appendix showing date filter changes by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1784
* docs: Bump the next version to 2.0.0 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1785
* docs: Bump the next version to 2.0.0 in more docs files by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1787
* vault: Update plugins: Tasks, dataview and Style Settings by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1678
* vault: Enable detailed manual testing of toggling by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1702

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* chore: Configure jest to work with Svelte components. by @3bit in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1757
* chore: Introduce 'contrib' Conventional Commit prefix for contributing docs by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1775
* contrib: update CONTRIBUTING.md for improved codebase navigation by @BluBloos in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1654
* contrib: Migrate CONTRIBUTING & related to Obsidian Publish by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1709
* contrib: Update all references to CONTRIBUTING.md by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1710
* contrib: contributing: add 'Useful links', rename FAQs & more by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1714
* contrib: Add several new pages on starting writing tests by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1725
* contrib: Status change docs more readable and include modal by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1776
* refactor: DateField, HappensDateField and approval tests on DueDateField by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1665
* refactor: Refactor filtering in DateField and HappensDateField classes by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1670
* refactor: regexp code in DateField and inherited classes by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1671
* refactor: Add TaskLocation to encapsulate position data by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1698
* refactor: Store task line numbers by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1700
* refactor: Make Task reading and writing more modular by @kedestin in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1728
* refactor: More logical order of default settings values by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1782
* test: Enable CustomMatchersForFilters without imports by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1676
* test: Fix assertions in Task tests & fix tests; thanks SonarLint by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1724
* test: Create mock tests for File.replaceTaskWithTasks() by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1771

---

## New Contributors
* @kedestin made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1712
* @vanadium23 made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1723
* @HynDuf made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1735
* @3bit made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1736

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/1.25.0...2.0.0

releases.description: ## What's Changed ### 🌟 Most Notable **Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.** 🌟 **Major new feature: Custom Task Statuses** New search instructions: `status.name` `status.type` #### Docs - [Statuses](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/statuses/) - [Style custom statuses](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/how-to/style-custom-statuses/) - [Set up custom statuses](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/how-to/set-up-custom-statuses/) - [Status Collections](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/reference/status-collections/) #### Credit: Sytone and the 'Tasks SQL Powered' plugin This plugin's implementation of reading, searching and editing custom statuses was entirely made possible by the work of @sytone and his fork of Tasks called ['Tasks SQL Powered'](https://github.com/sytone/obsidian-tasks-x). [^task-x-version] Where code in Tasks has been copied from 'Tasks SQL Powered', Sytone has been specifically credited as a co-author, that is, joint author, and these commits can be seen on the GitHub site: [Commits "Co-Authored-By: Sytone"](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3Aobsidian-tasks-group%2Fobsidian-tasks+%22Co-Authored-By%3A+Sytone%22&type=commits). Subsequently, the custom statuses implementation in Tasks has diverged from the 'Tasks SQL Powered' significantly. However, none of the new features and fixes would have been possible without Sytone's foundation work, for which we are very grateful. [^task-x-version]: 'Tasks SQL Powered' as of [revision 2c0b659](https://github.com/sytone/obsidian-tasks-x/tree/2c0b659457cc80806ff18585c955496c76861b87) on 2 August 2022 ### Full List **🌟 Features** ## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

**Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

**🌟  Added searching of recurrence rules**

- [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/filters/#recurrence)
- Examples:
    ```text
    recurrence includes wednesday
    recurrence does not include when done
    recurrence regex matches /\d/
    recurrence regex does not match /\d/
    ```
- Thank you for the suggestion, @pcause and @huntpbrennan!

### Full List

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Add text searching of task recurrence rules by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1449

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/1.21.0...1.22.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

**Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

#### Sorting Tasks: Features and Fixes
The majority of effort in this release went on **overhauling the code for sorting tasks**. In adding tests, I found and fixed a number of issues with the current sorting code. See the Fixes list below.

- **Added `sort by happens`** - this sorts by the earliest of scheduled, start and due dates.
- **Added `sort by filename`**
- **Added `sort by heading`**

Also, `group by filename` now links to the note, for quick navigation. Thanks @ilandikov!

### Full List

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Add `sort by happens` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1419
* feat: Add `sort by filename` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1422
* feat: Add `sort by heading` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1423
* feat: `group by filename` now links to the note by @ilandikov in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1426

**💪   Fixes**

Fixes to sorting of tasks:

* fix: Multiple `sort by tag` lines ignored all but last one by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1408
* fix: Make `sort by path` sort ignoring capitalisation by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1437
* fix: Make `sort by tag` sort ignoring capitalisation by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1439
* fix: Improve stripping of format chars in `sort by description` by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1440
* fix: Sorting by text fields now sorts numbers correctly by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1441

Other fixes:

* fix: Feature Request template link Ideas in Discussions was broken by @Sheikh-JamirAlam in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1412


**📖  Documentation**

* docs: Group sorting options by area by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1420
* docs: Tables in docs now easier to read, as aligned by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1425

**🛠️  Dependencies**

* build(deps): bump commonmarker from 0.23.5 to 0.23.6 in /docs by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1171
* chore(deps): Bump nokogiri from 1.13.8 to 1.13.10 in /docs by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1383
* chore(deps-dev): Bump svelte-check from 2.9.0 to 2.10.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1414


**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* chore: Enable manual running of codeql-analysis.yml CI by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1416
* chore: Faster PRs by running CodeQL on release by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1417
* refactor: Convert Sorting from alias to class, to store comparator by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1398
* refactor: StatusField now implements 'sort by status' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1399
* refactor: DueDateField now implements 'sort by due' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1400
* refactor: Reduce repetition in new sorting code by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1401
* refactor: Break some cyclic dependencies in Sorting code by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1403
* refactor: Field classes do all 'sort by' options except 'tag' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1406
* refactor: TagsField now implements 'sort by tag' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1411
* refactor: Rename Sorting to Sorter - and minor tidying by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1435
* refactor: Remove cyclic dependency between Query and Sort by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1436
* refactor: Improve design of task rendering code & add tests by @esm7 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1409
* test: Add Jest support for easier testing of sorting by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1404
* test: Finish adding tests for existing sort algorithms by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1405

## New Contributors
* @Sheikh-JamirAlam made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1412
* @ilandikov made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1426

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/1.20.0...1.21.0

    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/explaining-queries/)

Example result:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

**Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

**💪  Fixed: Improve next-date calculation for monthly and yearly recurring tasks, to prevent skipping months in years in many cases**

- **Previously**: When a recurrence rule stated "every month" and the next month did not have the day of the month that the task is scheduled, that month was skipped and the next valid month was used instead.
    - For example: When I marked a task that recurs "every month" done on January 31, the next occurrence would be scheduled on March 31, since February does not have 31 days. This is in line with the rrule specification, but not what users expect. This could be triggered by accident, for example when the task is based on the done date and the done date is on the 31st.
- **Now**: To fix the issue, the number of expected skipped months is parsed (defaults to one). So long as the actual number of skipped months is higher, the base date is adjusted one day into the past. In practice, this means that the example from above would now schedule the recurring task on the 28th of February (or the 29th for a leap year).
- The same applies for yearly recurrences, for example based on the 29th of February.
- **Full details in major new section of the documentation**: [How the New Date is Calculated: Repeating Monthly](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/recurring-tasks/#how-the-new-date-is-calculated-repeating-monthly)


### Full List

**💪   Fixes**

* fix: Improve next-date calculation for monthly and yearly recurring tasks by @schemar in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1197

**📖  Documentation**

* docs: Note release version of 'Only future dates' by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/1195
* vault: Update .gitignore for Obsidian 0.16.x changes (3f48c98febc0b83c3d5087e597ef90693cb67f1d)
* vault: Update appearance.json for Obsidian 0.16.x changes (2809b30f97ab6cea95c48f069722f34ef98f44d6)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/1.15.0...1.15.1
releases.name: 1.15.1: Improve next-date for monthly & yearly recurring tasks

    - **Corresponding CSS Changes**:
        - There is a new class `tasks-urgency` for the span that contains the urgency score.
        - The span for the edit button with the class `tasks-edit` is no longer inside the span with the span `tasks-backlink`: instead it is now a sibling.
        - If you styled the edit button with the class `.tasks-backlink .tasks-edit`, then you should remove the `.tasks-backlink`part, converting to `.tasks-edit`.

## What's Changed

### 🌟 Most Notable

Dependencies have been updated. **Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

- Support for **Regular Expressions in  `description`,  `heading`  and `path` searches** (thanks, @elight)
    - `description regex matches /waiting|waits|wartet/i`
    - `description regex matches /#tag\/subtag[0-9]\/subsubtag[0-9]/i`
    - `heading regex matches /^Exactly Matched Heading$/`
    - `path regex does not match /w.bble/`
    - Note that regular expressions are case-sensitive by default.
    - Please do read the docs if using this powerful feature:
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/regular-expressions/)
    - Follow [\#1040](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/discussions/1040) if you would like  regular expression support in `tag`/`tags` searches.

releases.description:
## What's Changed

🙏 Many thanks to @esm7 and @AnnaKornfeldSimpson for invaluable help throughout this release cycle! 

### 🌟 Most Notable

Dependencies have been updated. **Please restart Obsidian after updating the plugin. Thank you.**

* Support for **Boolean expressions** to combine queries together (`AND`, `OR`, `NOT`) (thanks, @esm7)
    * `(has start date) AND ((description includes secret) OR (has due date))`
    * [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/combining-filters/)
* New Intelligent dynamic **Auto-Suggest** for entering tasks (thanks, @esm7)
    ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/4840096/179611361-77149e72-1af2-4263-83f2-5e841f74c0fd.png)
    * [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/auto-suggest/)
* Allow task components (due, priority etc) and tags in almost any order (thanks, @esm7)
    * [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/auto-suggest/#what-do-i-need-to-know-about-the-order-of-items-in-a-task)
* **Speed up editing significantly** whilst Tasks blocks are displaying many results
    * Coming soon: documentation on how to get the best performance out of Tasks
* **Faster startup**, if any Tasks blocks were displaying results when Obsidian was previously closed
* **More informative console logging**, for if performance problems need investigating

### Full List

**🌟  Features**

* feat: Intelligent dynamic auto-complete for entering tasks by @esm7 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/822
* feat: Allow task components (due, priority etc) and tags in almost any order by @esm7 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/850
* feat: Add support for Boolean expression queries by @esm7 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/852

**💪 Fixes**

* fix: Allow multiple spaces after date emojis, when reading task lines by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/900
* fix: Urgency DST fix from @sytone by @AnnaKornfeldSimpson in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/845

**⚡ Performance**

* perf: Stop many non-task edits triggering a redraw of all active tasks blocks by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/894
* perf: Speed up plugin launch in some circumstances by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/901

**📖  Documentation**

* docs: Add user docs for boolean combinations by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/879
* docs: Note that Boolean combinations were introduced in Tasks 1.9.0 by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/880
* docs: Fixes to Combining Filters docs (code review) by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/902
* docs: Document auto-suggest & improve wording of its settings by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/897
* docs: Add developer docs to use GitHub builds and run smoke tests by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/858

**🤖  Dependencies**

* build(deps-dev): bump eslint-config-prettier from 8.3.0 to 8.5.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/860
* build(deps-dev): bump moment from 2.29.3 to 2.29.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/862
* build(deps-dev): bump @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin from 5.30.5 to 5.30.6 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/882
* build(deps-dev): bump @typescript-eslint/parser from 5.30.5 to 5.30.6 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/884
* build(deps-dev): bump jest and @types/jest by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/889
* build(deps-dev): bump jest-environment-jsdom from 28.1.2 to 28.1.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/888
* build: Add boon-js to yarn.lock by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/865
* chore: deps: bump moment and partially bump obsidian api by @AnnaKornfeldSimpson in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/854
* chore: deps-dev upgrades, see full list in Description by @AnnaKornfeldSimpson in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/872

**🛠️  Behind the scenes**

* chore: internal: Fix imports only used for types by @AnnaKornfeldSimpson in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/867
* fix: Boolean searches with spaces around sub-queries now work by @esm7 in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/868
* refactor: Preparation for only redrawing tasks blocks if edits change any tasks by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/887
* test: Simplify some tests in Task.test.ts by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/853
* test: move a parsing test to correct section by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/857
* test: Add BooleanField.test.ts with lower-level tests of BooleanField by @claremacrae in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/864

## New Contributors
* @esm7 made their first contribution in https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/pull/822

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks/compare/1.8.2...1.9.0

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Most Notable

- New filters: `has done date`,  `no done date`
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/filters/#done-date)
- New filters: `has happens date`, `no happens date`
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/filters/#happens)
- New groups options: `group by <start|scheduled|due|done>`
    - [Docs](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/grouping/#available-grouping-properties)
- Documentation now shows which version new features were released in.
- New locations for:
    - The GitHub repository:  [https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks)
    - The documentation: [https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/](https://obsidian-tasks-group.github.io/obsidian-tasks/)
- New maintainer: @claremacrae
    - [More information](https://www.reddit.com/r/ObsidianMD/comments/v1mbxm/obsidian_tasks_has_a_new_maintainer_and_a_new/)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changes
I may have broken some things as this is a rather large release. Let me know as soon as possible if you find any bugs. Please add them to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/schemar/obsidian-tasks/issues).

## Contributions
### Reverse Sorting (#254)
It is now possible to reverse the order of the results using for example `sort by due reverse`.

Thank you @Skn0tt!

### Added small section in tips to call out reminders (#353)
Added a section to the [documentation](https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/) which describes how to integrate Tasks with the [obsidian reminder plugin](https://github.com/uphy/obsidian-reminder).

Thank you @liambresnahan!

### Expose render methods (#363)
Internal changes which will enable the [CodeMirror options plugin](https://github.com/nothingislost/obsidian-codemirror-options) to show task query results in preview. [This is going to be cool](https://github.com/schemar/obsidian-tasks/discussions/361).

Thank you @nothingislost!

## Additions
### New and Expanded Documentation
See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/.

The new documentation also explains the new features in more detail.

### Add priority to tasks 
Initial simple version with three priorities plus "no priority" which is above "low" priority.

See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/priority/ for details.

### Add scheduled date
A new scheduled date to differentiate between "due" and "scheduled" for better task management.

See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/dates/ for details.

### Add start date
Can be used as a blocker when a task should be hidden until its start date.

See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/dates/ for details.

### All dates carry over for recurring tasks
Dates are all moved forward, relative to the primary date.

See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/getting-started/recurring-tasks/#priority-of-dates for details.

### Add urgency
Tasks are now by default sorted by "urgency". It is a calculated score that tries to reflect the likelihood that you need to work on a certain task.

See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/advanced/urgency/ for details.

### Add short mode
Added a new "short" mode which shows emoji details only on hover.

See https://schemar.github.io/obsidian-tasks/queries/layout/#short-mode for details.

## Bugfixes
- Recurrence now works as intended (#261, #324, #352)
    - New occurrences of recurring tasks are now due on the correct date
- Block links are now kept (#337)
    - Toggling or editing a task no longer removes the block link
- Sorting by description now regards markup (#310)
    - Sorting should now sort by the visible test instead of the markdown
- Filtering no longer applies to the global filter (#277)
    - The global filter is now completely ignored when filtering queries by description
- Spaced tasks are now rendered correctly in preview (#313)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changes

## Contributions
@Masstronaut: task commands are now easier to find in the command palette (#186)

## The "link" to a task's origin now excludes the braces
This makes it easier to see the difference between the description and the link to the origin of the task when the task description itself is a link.
(#158)

## The description can now include all emojis
Before, it was not possible to have one of the signifier emojis as part of the description.
Now, the special dates and recurrence rules are parsed and removed from the end one-by-one, meaning an emoji in the description won't interfere anymore with the parsing.
(#182)

## Next occurrence is now based on due date
The next occurrence would sometimes be too early based on the current date and not based on the due date of the task. This is now fixed by crafting a new rrule for the new tasks that starts on "due date".
(#190)

## Other
- Status character is now correctly preserved (#169)
- The readme explains the calendar agenda in more detail (#191)
- Description and header query filters now match case-insensitive (as intended) (#187)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changes

Tasks now supports recurring tasks :repeat: :tada: 

### Recurring tasks (repetition)

Tasks can be recurring.
In order to specify a recurrence rule of a task, you must append the "recurrence signifier 🔁" followed by the recurrence rule.
For example: `🔁 every weekday` means the task will repeat every week on Monday through Friday.

When you toggle the status of a recurring task to anything but "todo" (i.e. "done"), the orginal task that you wanted to toggle will be marked as done and get the done date appended to it, like any other task.
In addition, *a new task will be put one line above the original task.*
The new task will have the due date of the next occurrence after the due date of the original task.

Take as example the following task::

```
- [ ] take out the trash 🔁 every Sunday 📅 2021-04-25
```

If you mark the above task "done" on Saturday, the 24th of April, the file will now look like this:

```
-   [ ] take out the trash 🔁 every Sunday 📅 2021-05-02
-   [x] take out the trash 🔁 every Sunday 📅 2021-04-25 ✅ 2021-04-24
```

*For best compatibility, a recurring task should have a due date and the recurrence rule should appear before the due date of a task.*

Right now there is no direct feedback to whether your recurrence rule is valid.
You can validate that tasks understands your rule by checking that the task includes the recurrence rule when it is rendered, for example in the markdown preview of the file where it is defined or in another tasks query.
When it is shown (with the checkbox on the left), then tasks understands it.

Examples of possible recurrence rules (mix and match as desired; these should be considered inspirational):

-   `🔁 every weekday` (meaning every Mon - Fri)
-   `🔁 every week on Sunday`
-   `🔁 every 2 weeks`
-   `🔁 every 3 weeks on Friday`
-   `🔁 every 2 months`
-   `🔁 every month on the 1st`
-   `🔁 every 6 months on the 1st Wednesday`
-   `🔁 every January on the 15th`
-   `🔁 every year`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

# Changes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changes

⚠️ **Requires obsidian 12.0.0 or higher!**

Complete rewrite of the plug-in. It now utilizes the new capabilities of the metadata cache that were introduced in obsidian 12.
This is the first (pre-)release of the rewrite.
I have not tested it extensively, yet. I will do that this coming week by using it as my daily driver.

Check the readme for details.

## Tracking Tasks
Tasks are no longer tracked by specific identifiers like `- TODO`. Instead, regular checklist items are treated as tasks.

## Global Filter
There are now settings and they include a global filter. A global filter filters checklist items so that you can have checklist items which aren't tasks.
As an example, you could set your global filter to `#task`. It can be any string. It doesn't have to be a tag. If it is set, a checklist item has to have the defined global filter on its line.

Example:
```
- [ ] #task this would be considered a task with a due date 📅 2021-04-23
- [ ] this as well #task
- [x] and also this #task 📅 2021-03-03 ✅ 2021-04-04
- [ ] this is a regular checklist item and not a task (won't have done date or appear in queries)
```

## Migration Support
I understand that this is a big change and potentially means a lot of work for you, as you need to change all existing tasks to be in the new format if you want to migrate to this version. Contact me if you need help with this.

If you know how to use `sed` on the command line, you can do the following. I tested it only on Linux. I know that macOS' `sed` has some peculiarities, so I am not sure whether it works on macOS.

**If you try these, make sure first that you have a backup of your vault!**

Moving to the new model with #task as the task identifier:
```
# From within your vault directory:
sed -i 's/- TODO/- \[ \] #task/' ./**/*.md
sed -i 's/- DONE/- \[x\] #task/' ./**/*.md
```

Without any global filter:
```
# From within your vault directory:
sed -i 's/- TODO/- \[ \]/' ./**/*.md
sed -i 's/- DONE/- \[x\]/' ./**/*.md
```

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changes
## Cache now also updates on create, rename, delete

The cache wasn't update when a file was created, renamed, or deleted.
Tasks would then list double (as the original and the one from the
renamed file, for example).

The cache now subscribes to further vault events in order to stay in
sync with the vault.

## Task blocks now list all tasks by default

When including tasks via a ```tasks block, the results now shall all
tasks by default, regardless of their indentation.

There is now a new query option `exclude sub-items` to re-enable the
original behavior.

Before, the result list would only show top-level tasks, which was
confusing.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
